item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.17
- Clear stale running indicators from Codex Desktop session files when a session records `task_complete` or `turn_aborted`. - Suppress older running hints when a newer session completion is available, preventing completed threads from reappearing as running. - Preserve session completion hints during database fallback so locked or temporarily unavailable state databases do not leave completed sessions stuck as running. - Added regression coverage for completed sessions, newer completion hints, and fallback completion handling.
